title: WP-002-C1: retire deprecated probe consolidation shim from runtime wiring
intent: Owner-authorized (Complete Sprint) retirement of the deprecated probe_consolidated_router from runtime/package wiring. Repoint routers/probe/__init__.py to mount the six focused sub-routers directly (boss, corner, pocket, surface_z, vise_square, setup) and remove the package-level probe_router re-export. The compatibility module remains importable with a DeprecationWarning so downstream branches/scripts do not break at import time while migrating. The retired runtime shim was a pure pass-through that only re-exported these same include_router() calls, so all probe endpoint paths and behavior are unchanged. Evidence: Investigation 007 + PR #209 (single package importer) + PR #210 (replacement coverage). Independent PR; retract/drilling untouched.
behavior_change: none - runtime wiring/symbol change only. All 17 probe endpoints (/boss|/corner|/pocket|/surface_z|/vise_square x /gcode,/gcode/download,/gcode/download_governed; plus /setup_sheet/svg, /patterns) resolve at identical paths with identical responses. No route added/removed/moved; no request/response model change. Direct imports of the deprecated compatibility module remain available with DeprecationWarning.

diff_articulation.what_changed: (1) services/api/app/routers/probe/__init__.py: removed the import of the deprecated aggregate (`from .probe_consolidated_router import router as probe_router`) and the `router.include_router(probe_router)` call; replaced with direct `router.include_router(...)` of the six focused sub-routers already imported in the module (boss, corner, pocket, surface_z, vise_square, setup) - the exact calls the shim made internally. Removed the backward-compat `probe_router` entry from __all__. (2) services/api/app/routers/probe/probe_consolidated_router.py remains as a deprecated import-compatible facade, but is no longer used by package runtime wiring. (3) services/api/tests/test_probe_shim_retirement_invariant.py asserts all 17 probe endpoint suffixes remain mounted with methods and probe tags, the shim module remains import-compatible with DeprecationWarning, and the aggregate package re-export is gone.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: Retires an unfinished-migration compatibility shim (adjudicated Complete Sprint) from runtime wiring while preserving a safe downstream import bridge. Not cosmetic: removes the deprecated indirection layer from app registration and adds route/import invariant guards, with zero endpoint/behavior change. Retract and drilling shims are intentionally NOT touched (separate PRs WP-002-C2 / C3).

files.intent: Repoint: mount the six focused sub-routers directly (was: via the deprecated probe_consolidated_router aggregate); drop the package-level probe_router import and __all__ re-export. Endpoint paths/behavior unchanged.
Retain an import-compatible deprecated facade while removing it from package runtime wiring; downstream direct imports receive DeprecationWarning instead of ModuleNotFoundError.
files.behavior_change: none for registered API routes; compatibility behavior preserved for direct imports

files.intent: Route/import invariant guard: all 17 probe endpoints remain mounted with methods/tags; shim module remains import-compatible with DeprecationWarning; aggregate package re-export removed.
